criteria.criterionText: But no feature evidence packet exists under `evidence/runs/<run-id>/features/<feature-id>/scenarios/<scenario-id>/`
criteria.llmObservationSummary: This criterion describes a precondition for the scenario. As a tester, I cannot verify the existence or non-existence of a file path from the provided Gherkin or the absence of external reports. This is a setup condition, not an observable outcome.
criteria.recommendedFixRoute: Provide the necessary reports (report.md, Gemini receipt) which would reflect the outcome of this precondition being met.

criteria.criterionText: Then the feature scenario verdict should be BLOCKED
criteria.llmObservationSummary: Verification of the scenario verdict requires inspecting the 'report.md' or the Gemini live-call receipt, neither of which were provided.
criteria.recommendedFixRoute: Provide the 'report.md' and Gemini live-call receipt that contain the scenario verdict.

criteria.criterionText: And the finding code should be:
criteria.llmObservationSummary: Verification of the finding code 'feature-executable-body-report-missing' requires inspecting the 'report.md' or the Gemini live-call receipt, neither of which were provided.
criteria.recommendedFixRoute: Provide the 'report.md' and Gemini live-call receipt that contain the finding code.

criteria.criterionText: And no global report should mark the scenario promotion-ready.
criteria.llmObservationSummary: Verification of the global report status requires inspecting the 'report.md' or the Gemini live-call receipt, neither of which were provided.
criteria.recommendedFixRoute: Provide the 'report.md' and Gemini live-call receipt that contain the global report status.
